issues.description: Weak hashing algorithm detected (MD5 or SHA1). These are vulnerable to collision attacks. Use SHA-256 or SHA-3 instead: hashlib.sha256().
issues.why_this_matters: MD5 is cryptographically weak and can be abused via collisions in integrity checks.
issues.recommended_fix: For passwords, use `bcrypt` or `argon2` (not general-purpose hashes). For file/message integrity, prefer `hashlib.sha256`.

issues.description: Weak hashing algorithm detected (MD5 or SHA1). These are vulnerable to collision attacks. Use SHA-256 or SHA-3 instead: hashlib.sha256().
issues.why_this_matters: SHA1 is cryptographically weak and can be abused via collisions in integrity checks.
issues.recommended_fix: Use stronger algorithms such as SHA-256/SHA-3, or password hashing libraries (bcrypt/argon2).
